10.reason: [C89 does not allow variable declaration inside for loop initialization]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [C89 does not allow variable declaration inside for loop initialization]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  C89/C90 standard does not allow variable declaration inside for-loop initialization; declare k before the loop.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [C89/C90 standard does not allow variable declaration inside the for-loop initialization statement, causing a compilation error in strict C environments]
